columns.extraction_plan: The 'abstract' on page 1 states, 'Patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were randomly assigned to darolutamide or placebo plus androgen-deprivation therapy and docetaxel.' The 'Trial Design' section on page 2 further clarifies, 'Enrolled patients were randomly assigned (1:1) to oral darolutamide 600 mg twice daily or matched placebo, in combination with ADT and docetaxel.' This indicates two arms. Figure 1 on page 3, the CONSORT flow diagram, visually confirms the two arms: 'Darolutamide + docetaxel + ADT' and 'Placebo + docetaxel + ADT'.
